# Registries.ReservedErrorCodes property

The eight codes a custom code MUST NOT collide with: the five standard JSON-RPC codes, the two protocol codes, and `-32001` HeaderMismatch (spec R-AppB-a). `-32001` is the member that lies inside the `-32000..-32099` server-error range.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<int> ReservedErrorCodes { get; }
```
